Adobe Commerce Marketplace — submission ZIPs
==============================================

From the repository root, run:

  ./scripts/build-submission-packages.sh

This creates (gitignored *.zip):

  dist/paydibs-module-paymentgateway-open-source.zip   → paydibs/module-paymentgateway (Magento Open Source)
  dist/paydibs-module-paymentgateway-commerce.zip      → paydibs/module-paymentgateway-commerce (Adobe Commerce)
  dist/SHA256SUMS.txt                                  → checksums for the two ZIPs

Upload the ZIP that matches your listing. The archive root contains composer.json, registration.php,
and the module tree expected by Composer path installs and Marketplace validation.

composer.json includes "version": "103.0.0" — use Marketplace Version Number v103.0.0 (verified from package).

Form copy-paste help: docs/marketplace/TECHNICAL_SUBMISSION.md
Release notes text: docs/marketplace/RELEASE_NOTES_FOR_PORTAL.txt
PDF (print from browser): docs/marketplace/Paydibs-PaymentGateway-Installation-and-User-Guide.html
